rerun0.24.0-alpha.1+dev

In rerun::dataframe::external::re_chunk::external::arrow::util::bit_util

rerun::dataframe::external::re_chunk::external::arrow::util::bit_util

Function round_upto_power_of_2

pub fn round_upto_power_of_2(num: usize, factor: usize) -> usize
Expand description

Returns the nearest multiple of factor that is >= than num. Here factor must be a power of 2.
